overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a prison facility. The character ascends a concrete stairwell, walks along a sunlit walkway with barred windows overlooking a lower level, and enters a prison cell containing basic furnishings. The environment features industrial concrete architecture with warm, desaturated lighting and realistic shadow casting.

events.description: character reaches top of stairs and approaches exit doorway leading to bright walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs steadily while holding a weapon, approaching a metal gate exit

entered.detail: enclosed concrete stairwell with weathered walls and metal railings on both sides
metal grate stairs allowing light to pass through from below
rusted metal safety railing along the left side of the stairwell
stenciled alphanumeric sign marking the stairwell section

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person character ascending a narrow concrete stairwell with metal railings. The environment is dimly lit with artificial lighting, and the walls show signs of weathering. The character approaches a bright exit at the top of the stairs marked with an 'A-3' sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated prison walkway with barred windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the walkway, passing wooden crates and looking toward the barred windows

entered.detail: large rectangular windows with metal bars allowing bright sunlight to stream into the corridor
metal safety railing along the right edge of the walkway overlooking a lower level
large wooden shipping crate or box placed against the left wall
metal barred doors of prison cells lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairwell into a sunlit prison walkway with barred windows on the right casting striped shadows across the concrete floor. The walkway is lined with prison cell doors on the left and features a safety railing overlooking a lower level. The character walks past wooden crates while bright natural light illuminates the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: prison cell block corridor approaching cell A-3

events.description: character slows and turns slightly left to approach the open entrance of cell A-3

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance to cell A-3, moving from the bright walkway into a darker corridor

entered.detail: darker enclosed corridor with multiple cell entrances and overhead metal mesh
vertical metal bars of prison cell doors and gates
sign marking cell A-3 mounted above the cell entrance
open metal barred door leading into the prison cell

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the bright walkway into a darker cell block corridor. The environment becomes more enclosed with reduced natural lighting. The character approaches cell A-3, identified by an overhead sign, and moves toward the open barred door.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of prison cell A-3 with basic furnishings

events.description: character enters the prison cell, moving from the corridor into the confined cell interior
character turns around and begins exiting the cell

agents.ego_description: entering the cell and looking around at the bed and toilet fixtures, then turning to exit

entered.detail: simple metal bed frame with thin mattress against the left wall
stainless steel toilet fixture mounted against the back wall
small metal sink basin attached to the wall near the toilet
bare concrete block walls showing stains and weathering

segments.scene_description: The character enters the confined interior of prison cell A-3, which contains a metal bed frame, toilet, and sink against bare concrete walls. The lighting is dim with shadows cast by the small window. After briefly examining the cell interior, the character turns and exits back into the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, industrial stairwell into a sunlit prison corridor and finally into the confined interior of a cell. It begins with a character ascending a narrow concrete stairwell under artificial light, moving upward toward a bright exit marked with an A-3 sign. As the character emerges, the scene opens into a bright walkway where natural light streams through barred windows, casting striped shadows across the floor and wooden crates. The camera then follows the character as the environment shifts back into a darker, enclosed cell block corridor, leading directly toward the open door of cell A-3. Finally, the view enters the dim, cramped space of the cell to reveal a metal bed and basic plumbing before turning back toward the corridor.
